/usr/bin/clang++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/oop_2_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/ellips.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/figure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/figure_list.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/line.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/parallel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/rectangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/triangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/qmyframe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/shape_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/shape_visitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/circle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/oop_2.dir/qt_painter_visitor.cpp.o -o oop_2.app/Contents/MacOS/oop_2 -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
